_commit_policy: Commit this file. It contains only durable project defaults and guardrails.
definition_of_done: 코드 변경은 기본적으로 `pnpm test`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm build:all`을 통과해야 하며, 필요 시 `pnpm tsc --noEmit`로 타입 검증을 보강한다.
change_guardrails: 인증, 권한, 세션, 미들웨어, SAML/SSO 흐름 변경은 먼저 확인받는다.
공개 API 계약, 외부 연동, 시크릿/암호화 처리 변경은 먼저 확인받는다.
데이터 마이그레이션, Prisma 스키마 파괴적 변경, 운영 배포 영향이 큰 수정은 먼저 확인받는다.
project_constraints: Prisma 스키마 변경 뒤에는 `pnpm --filter=@suppo/db generate`와 적절한 마이그레이션 흐름을 반드시 반영한다.
Edge 미들웨어와 Edge에서 호출될 수 있는 JWT callback 경로에는 Prisma 직접 조회를 추가하지 않는다.
필수 시크릿(`AUTH_SECRET`, `TICKET_ACCESS_SECRET`, `GIT_TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY`)은 기본값 없이 관리하고 길이 요건을 지킨다.
운영 배포에서는 sqld 외부 노출 금지와 shared uploads 볼륨 규칙을 깨지 않는다.
stack_summary: Docker Compose and Nginx for deployment

environment.development: Local development uses pnpm workspace commands with SQLite and dual Next.js apps.
environment.runtime: Node.js 22 Alpine container runtime for admin/public apps and migrator jobs.
environment.primary_os: macOS for local development; Linux containers for deployment.

change_history.change: Initialized local harness bootstrap and confirmed collaboration language.
change_history.reason: Bootstrap durable harness state for this repository.

change_history.change: Confirmed default completion gate, verification policy, and root execution commands.
change_history.reason: Repository owner confirmed the default done criteria for routine work.
Repository owner prefers small, low-risk changes unless broader work is explicitly requested.

change_history.change: Confirmed sensitive-area change guardrails for auth, APIs, secrets, and database-impacting work.
change_history.reason: Repository owner wants explicit confirmation before high-risk or security-sensitive changes.

change_history.change: Confirmed approval policy for risky changes only.
change_history.reason: Safe small changes may proceed directly, but risky changes require explicit confirmation.

change_history.change: Captured repository constraints and inferred stack/environment defaults from strong repo signals.
change_history.reason: Existing README, Docker assets, and package manifests provide stable canonical project context.

change_history.change: Confirmed a more detailed and explanatory collaboration tone.
change_history.reason: Repository owner prefers detailed guidance over terse responses.

notes: Existing root documentation is primarily Korean, so communication_language was confirmed as ko during bootstrap.
Root scripts and existing docs indicate `pnpm tsc --noEmit` is a documented fallback typecheck command even though it is not exposed as a root package.json script.
